name: 5dim_infiniteresearch
title: 5Dim's mod - Infinite Research
author: 5Dim
description:
Infinite Research module for 5Dim's mod
Adds infinite research options for late-game progression
This mod includes:
- Infinite crafting speed research
- Infinite mining speed research
- Infinite bullet damage research
- Infinite laser turret damage research
- Infinite worker robot battery research
- Infinite worker robot storage research
- Infinite braking force research
- Infinite stack size research
- Tech productivity and speed bonuses
